ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the region record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the region record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the state belongs to */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the state record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the state record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parks" (
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each park */,
  "park_name" TEXT /* Name of the park */,
  "park_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the park */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the park is located */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the park (e.g., National Park, Monument) */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the park was established */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the park */,
  "park_status" TEXT /* Current status of the park (e.g., open, closed, under construction) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the park record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the park record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("park_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parks_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visitation_data" (
  "visitation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visitation record */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the park */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the visitation data */,
  "visitors" INTEGER /* Number of visitors */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., gate count, ticket sales) */,
  "visitation_type" TEXT /* Type of visitation data (e.g., annual, monthly, daily) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the visitation data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the visitation data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the visitation data record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visitation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitation_data_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visitor_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "visitation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the visitation data */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the visitor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the visitor */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the visitor (e.g., state, country) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the visitor */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin of the visitor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the visitor demographic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the visitor demographic record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitor_demographics_visitation_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitation_id") REFERENCES visitation_data ("visitation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the park */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., guided tour, educational program) */,
  "event_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity for the event */,
  "event_registration" TEXT /* Whether registration is required for the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the event record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the event record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the park */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of the facility (e.g., trail, campground, visitor center) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility within the park */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the facility (e.g., open, closed, under maintenance) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "facility_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the facility */,
  "facility_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the facility */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the facility record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the facility record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of maintenance activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the activity (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the activity */,
  "maintenance_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the maintenance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the maintenance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_maintenance_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., park ranger, data analyst, admin) */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the park the user is associated with */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park the data is related to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "park_management" (
  "management_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each management record */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the park */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the park manager */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the park manager */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the park office */,
  "management_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about park management */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("management_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_park_management_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "park_budget" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget record */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the park */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the budget */,
  "budget_amount" REAL /* Total budget amount */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of the funding */,
  "budget_breakdown" TEXT /* Detailed breakdown of the budget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_park_budget_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "park_expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense record */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the park */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the expense */,
  "expense_amount" REAL /* Amount of the expense */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the expense (e.g., maintenance, personnel, supplies) */,
  "expense_category" TEXT /* Type of expense (e.g., travel, equipment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_park_expenses_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "park_revenue" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue record */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the park */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the revenue */,
  "revenue_amount" REAL /* Amount of the revenue */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the revenue (e.g., entrance fees, donations) */,
  "revenue_source" TEXT /* Type of revenue (e.g., government, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_park_revenue_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "park_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the park */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the inventory item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the inventory item (e.g., supplies, equipment) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item */,
  "last_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory audit */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the inventory item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_park_inventory_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "park_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit activity */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inventory item */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "auditor_name" TEXT /* Name of the auditor */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the audit */,
  "audit_findings" TEXT /* Results of the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_park_audit_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES park_inventory ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "park_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the park */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., annual, monthly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_park_reports_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "park_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the park */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of the incident (e.g., wildlife encounter, visitor injury) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "response_team" TEXT /* Response team involved in handling the incident */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_park_incidents_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "park_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the park */,
  "visitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the visitor providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the visitor */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or review from the visitor */,
  "feedback_category" TEXT /* Category of the feedback (e.g., facilities, services) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_park_feedback_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "park_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the park */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., educational materials, maintenance tools) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the resource information was last updated */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_park_resources_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "park_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the park */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "project_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_park_projects_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)
